  • Uses of EMediplanExtendable in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan that implement EMediplanExtendable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EMediplan<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,M extends EMediplanMedicament<E>,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class to model an eMediplan document object, be it of CHMED16A or CHMED23A specs.
    class 
    EMediplanMedicament<E extends EMediplanObject>
    A base class for an eMediplan medicament object.
    class 
    EMediplanPatient<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class for modelling an eMediplan patient object, be it for CHMED16A or CHMED23A.
    class 
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData<E extends EMediplanObject>
     

  • Uses of EMediplanExtendable in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a

    Subinterfaces of EMediplanExtendable in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ChMed16AExtendable
    Interface for objects that contain extensions.
    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a that implement EMediplanExtendable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChMed16AEMediplan<M extends ChMed16AMedicament>
    This is the main eMediplan object, called Medication in CHMED16A specification.
    class 
    ChMed16AExtension
    Extensions can be used to include additional information within an eMediplan that is not explicitly modelled by the ChMed specification.
    class 
    ChMed16AMedicament
    Information about a medication as well as its dosage.
    class 
    ChMed16APatient
     
    class 
    ChMed16APatientMedicalData
     
    class 
    EPrescription
    Model according to the specifications of eMediplan in the context of ePrescription.
    class 
    EPrescriptionMedicament
    Extension of the ChMed16AMedicament for the revision 3 of the CHMED16A ePrescription format.
